creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hello, thanks for the report. It is rather eh ' useless ' though. What do you 
mean with the report? IS there a problem at all? Do you have a question? 

Please expand your question a bit more with reasoning so that we can see 
whether this suffices a PR record or that you should ask a mailinglist 
(which is most likely the case anyway).
